item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium, Gewrmany – several projects
📅 Start Date: several dates
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian/German temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Quality Planning and Assurance
✅ Inspection and Testing
✅ Non-Conformance Management
✅ Document Control
✅ Compliance and Audits
✅ Communication and Coordination

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ 3+ years of experience in a similar role
✔️ Good understanding of English
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Belgium Germany Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] QA QC – Electrical at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Rotterdam, Netherlands
📅 Start Date: ASAP
📄 Contract: Dutch temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Connecting cables with HAWKE/CMP glands
✅ Disconnecting & connecting instrumentation/tubing
✅ Assembling & dismantling sensors, valves, transmitters
✅ Pulling cables & making electrical connections
✅ Occasional ironwork related to electrical installations

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ Conversational English required
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job

item.title: [AI Job] ETO with Cable Lay Barge Experience – STCW Certification Required at Treasure G

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Rotation: 3 months ON / 1 month OFF (unpaid)

Qualification: 2 yrs. of relevant experience in the rank of ETO in Supply or DSV vessels (1000 or more DP Hours)

National COC, DPVM and High Voltage



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO for DP2 AHTS and DSV Vessels – High Voltage Certification Required at Marpo Offshore and Maritime Recruitment

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Anglo-Eastern Offshore is currently seeking an Electro-Technical Officer (ETO) for a newbuild CLV. If you are available to mobilise immediately, we would like to hear from you.

Position: ETO
Vessel Type: OSV / CLV
Joining Port: The Netherlands (yard)
Travel Date: ASAP
Rotation: 6 weeks on/off (permanent)

Requirements:
Certificate of Competency (ETO)
Valid STCW certification
Valid medical certificate
High Voltage
Marlins test
Applicants must be EU residents or have the right to work in the EU.

Candidates available for immediate travel (including next-day mobilisation)
Suitable candidates are encouraged to apply as soon as possible.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Electro-Technical Officer (ETO) for Newbuild Cable Layer Vessel (CLV) at Anglo-Eastern Ship Management (New Delhi Office)

item.description:
Location:
Description:

ETO needed to join an Accommodation Vessel in South America starting on the 3rd of June for 4/5 week rotations.

Requirements:

  • CoC
  • STCWs
  • HV
  • K-Pos DP Maintenance
  • BOSIET/FOET
  • CAEBS
  • Seaman’s Book
  • Passport
  • Medical


Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Position Available for Accommodation Vessel – DP Maintenance Certification Required at WRS - Worldwide Recruitment Solutions
